allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:10086/command" -Method POST -Body '{"action":"screenshot","args":{"format":"png","quality":50},"session":"archive2"}' -ContentType "application/json"; $bytes = [Convert]::FromBase64String\($r.data.data\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\("E:\\GitHub_tools\\galaxy-terminal\\temp_screenshot.png", $bytes\); Write-Host "Saved: temp_screenshot.png \($\($bytes.Length\) bytes\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{doc.get\(\\"identifier\\",\\"?\\"\)} | {doc.get\(\\"title\\",\\"?\\"\)[:80]} | DL:{doc.get\(\\"downloads\\",0\)}'\) for doc in d['response']['docs']]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total: {d[\\"response\\"][\\"numFound\\"]}'\); [print\(f'  {doc.get\(\\"identifier\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\) for doc in d['response']['docs']]")
